name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan fundamentally changes the methodology for parameter estimation and sensitivity analysis. Step 1 of the new plan replaces the MLE/CRLB approach with non-linear least squares and perturbation-based sensitivity analysis. Step 2 and 3 are also significantly altered to reflect these new metrics. Therefore, no steps from the old plan can be reused as the underlying data processing and analysis logic are different.
